# Salt

> Tenex's design system and shared React component library: domain-neutral UI primitives, semantic styling, and design-engineering guidance for consuming apps.

Salt is primarily a React component library packaged with design-system tokens, styles, and guidance. Import public runtime APIs from `@tenex-eng/salt`; do not assume Next.js, routing, server-component, or app-domain APIs belong in Salt.

Salt is private on GitHub Packages. Configure `.npmrc` and `NODE_AUTH_TOKEN` with the TENEX Engineering Vault GitHub Classic Token before installing; do not commit the token.

Load Salt styles once near the consuming app root. Non-Tailwind consumers use compiled CSS:

```ts
import "@tenex-eng/salt/styles.css";
```

Tailwind v4 consumers keep one app-owned `@import "tailwindcss"`, then add:

```css
@import "@tenex-eng/salt/styles/tailwind.css";
```

Use `@tenex-eng/salt/styles/base.css` only for advanced custom pipelines.

Before coding, inspect the installed public API:

1. `node_modules/@tenex-eng/salt/dist/index.d.ts`
2. `node_modules/@tenex-eng/salt/src/index.ts` and component source/stories when available

Compose exported Salt primitives before creating custom UI. Use Salt's generic interface language:

- `Tone`: generic color intent such as `neutral`, `info`, `success`, `caution`, `warning`, `danger`.
- `Appearance`: generic emphasis or visual treatment within a component.
- `Domain adapter`: app-owned mapping from product terms such as severity, priority, status, or health into Salt language.

Salt v1 AI docs intentionally avoid generated inventory, `llms-full.txt`, MCP integration, and a manually maintained component map.

## Docs

- [Structured AI docs](docs/ai/index.md): consumer setup, API discovery, design language, and skill installation.
- [Design engineering index](docs/design-engineering/index.md): topic map for Salt UI implementation guidance.
- [Consumer agent instructions](docs/agents/salt-consumer.md): copyable guidance for consuming app agent instructions.
- [Components guidance](docs/design-engineering/components.md): composition, loading/empty states, and component conventions.
- [Color guidance](docs/design-engineering/colors.md): purpose intents, tones, expressions, and dark mode.
- [Token architecture](docs/design-engineering/mise-en-mode.md): intent token model and semantic styling.
- [Accessibility guidance](docs/design-engineering/accessibility.md): touch, keyboard, and ARIA rules.

## Optional

- [Package README](README.md): install, style imports, component import example, and development commands.
- [Package root AI quickstart](AI.md): alternate quickstart for agents that look for `AI.md`.
